title: HGL Glow in the Dark Putty, Rainbow Colour Changing, Kids Sensory Play Toy, Boys and Girls Age 3+
features: GLOW FEATURE: Specially formulated putty that glows brightly in the dark, perfect for creative sensory play and entertainment
COLOUR CHANGING: Rainbow-coloured putty changes hues as you stretch and manipulate it, creating fascinating visual effects
AGE APPROPRIATE: Designed for children aged 3 years and above, offering a safe and engaging play experience
STORAGE SOLUTION: Comes in a sturdy, sealed tub container to keep the putty fresh and prevent it from drying out
SENSORY PLAY: Stretchy, squeezable texture provides tactile stimulation and helps develop fine motor skills whilst being fun to manipulate
description: Product Description Discover the magical world of HGL's Glow in the Dark Putty! This fascinating sensory toy captivates children with its remarkable colour-changing properties and ethereal glow. Perfect for children aged 3 and above, this rainbow putty comes in a convenient storage tub and provides hours of creative play. Watch in amazement as the putty transforms through various vibrant hues, then turn off the lights to experience its mesmerising glow-in-the-dark effect. The putty offers an engaging tactile experience - stretch it, squeeze it, bounce it, or mould it into endless shapes. Its unique properties make it an excellent tool for sensory development and imaginative play. The generous portion comes in a secure screw-top container that keeps the putty fresh and ready for the next play session. Whether for entertainment, stress relief, or creative expression, this versatile putty delivers an enchanting experience that will keep young minds engaged and entertained. Safety Warning Not Suitable For Children Under 3 Years. Contains Small Parts.
